goal: 记录 I4 文档和 skill 对齐线程启动

summary.title: 记录 I4 文档和 skill 对齐线程启动
summary.what: Recorded the actual I4 worker thread id and worktree path in the canonical workflow control plane.
summary.why: The orchestrator needs durable state for docs/skill alignment so later turns can reconcile the correct worker output.
summary.user_goal: 记录 I4 文档和 skill 对齐线程启动

decisions.rationale: Actual thread/worktree readback is authoritative after the launcher initially returned only a pending worktree id.
rejected: Leaving I4 as TBD would make recovery depend on thread search.

review_notes: Docs-only control-plane checkpoint; git diff --check passed before commit.

behavioral_changes: I4 docs/skill worker is active and registered for reconciliation.
